Unshakable Juggernaut.name: Unshakable Juggernaut
Unshakable Juggernaut.description: Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to legendary. When you roll a critical failure on a Fortitude save, you get a failure instead. When you fail a Fortitude save against an effect that deals damage, you halve the damage you take.

Gap Influenced.name: Gap Influenced
Gap Influenced.description:
The Gap shaped you in some way, whether through enduring study or personal experience. Perhaps you were born during the Gap or lived through it thanks to an incredible lifespan, stasis technology, or time travel.

Tradition occult

Paradox Skill Society

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yXD9uU8w8uFD2OBQ]{Delete}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yrZA4k2VAqEP8xx7]{Repulsion}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tZQpEnaFqwmU4AMZ]{Warp Presence}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TAbOBvFU8dLzKiWw]{Forget}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.YAa1StmuYC2QQ043]{Reality Wipe}

Quantum Field Supernatural static obscures you from sight. You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures within your quantum field. When a creature within your quantum field hits you with an attack, you lose this benefit against that creature until the start of your next turn.

Stellar Senses.name: Stellar Senses
Stellar Senses.description: Your careful training and honed senses give you increased awareness of your surroundings. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, making you faster to react during combat. This bonus increases to +3 if you have the Incredible Initiative general feat.

Ghost.name: 幽灵 Ghost
Ghost.description:
You specialize in slipping into a location, completing an objective, and extricating yourself without being discovered. You might use stealth tactics, cover identities, disguises, or spy tech. Whether you're an assassin getting close to your target, a spy gathering sensitive intelligence, a grifter out to dupe your mark, or a thief casing the joint for your next job, you're good at blending in and avoiding notice. You're trained in Deception. You gain a skill feat for Deception.

Exploit: You're adept at taking your foe by surprise. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at targets you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} by as a free action.

Enhanced Exploit: You avoid detection even after engaging your enemy. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JXQaCPCd10sE0Gaa]{Ghost Tap} action.

Warped Infinities.name: Warped Infinities
Warped Infinities.description: You've mastered your reality and a thousand realities beyond. The radius of your quantum field becomes 100 feet. When you activate or Sustain your quantum field, you can modify the area of its effect by excluding any number of squares.

Resilient Soul.name: Resilient Soul
Resilient Soul.description: The links to your connection and your bonded companions bolster your soul against doubt. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Analyst.name: Analyst
Analyst.description:
There's a hidden code that powers the Universe and realms beyond, and by focusing your intellect, you can tap into it and see the equations.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Computers

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.NkvRoN33RbDg3fl9]{Analyze Target}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tVTJS07cKDA5rNgc]{Sift the Sphere}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CptKtBneM7od45nc]{Subjective Reality}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KOkGLXwOBAIlczzk]{Warp Probability}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vL7w8EtvZHlgRKlo]{Alternate Outcome}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.v8JA4sG2tsVP2gOM]{Quantum Analysis}

Quantum Field When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, you can apply the result against two related creatures, hazards, unattended objects, and effects in your quantum field. Whenever you Sustain your quantum field, you can Seek or Recall Knowledge against a target in your quantum field as a free action.

Quantum Will.name: Quantum Will
Quantum Will.description: The intense experiences you've accumulated through your studies or travels have strengthened your mental fortitude. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Urban Operator.name: Urban Operator
Urban Operator.description: You are accustomed to urban environments and can move swiftly through a crowded cityscape. You ignore difficult terrain in urban environments, and greater difficult terrain from urban environments is only difficult terrain for you.

Close Quarters.name: 贴身共战 Close Quarters
Close Quarters.description:
While you have the necessary training to employ heavy weapons, you believe it's important to keep a backup for when foes get too close. You might be a veteran Veskarium trooper who knows their way around a doshko or a devotee of Zon-Shelyn dealing holy wrath with a painglaive. Blows with heavy close combat weapons hinder your foes just as effectively as when you fire a rotolaser or a missile launcher.

As long as you're wielding a two-handed melee weapon, you meet the requirements for soldier feats that require an area weapon. When using a soldier feat, you can treat any two-handed melee weapon you're wielding as having the area (burst 5 feet), allowing you to area fire with the weapon centering the burst on a corner of a square you occupy, and you are unaffected by attacks with that weapon. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe} feat.

Legendary Armor.name: 传奇护甲 Legendary Armor
Legendary Armor.description: Your skill with armor is unparalleled. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to legendary.

Connection.name: Connection
Connection.description:
All mystics have a supernatural connection with a cosmic force that grants magical powers. The exact nature of your connection can vary widely—you might worship a god or pantheon, embody a metaphysical concept, become a conduit for nature's wrath, or something else. Even mystics who share the same connection might interpret the source of their powers differently. At 1st level, choose your connection. Your chosen connection determines the type of spells you cast and the spell tradition you choose spells from, your additional trained skill, the epiphanies you learn, and a harmony that usually grants creatures a special benefit when you heal them with your vitality network.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{Akashic}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{Elemental}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{Healing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{Rhythm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{Shadow}

Through Desperate Times.name: Through Desperate Times
Through Desperate Times.description:
You step up to lead during difficult times. You might have experienced a traumatic event, perhaps escaping a pirate ship during a mutiny, or you fought in some notorious battle. Your allies trust your instincts, knowing you'll keep them safe.

Leadership Skill Medicine

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{Battle Medicine} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oRdDgSC3RVpNgisd]{Keep on Keeping On!}

Light Armor Expertise.name: 轻甲专家 Light Armor Expertise
Light Armor Expertise.description: 你学会了如何在穿着轻甲或不穿甲时闪避。你在轻甲以及无甲防御上的熟练度提升至专家。

Expert Spellcaster.name: 专家施法者 Expert Spellcaster
Expert Spellcaster.description:
Mystic You've formed a more powerful bond with your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to expert.

Witchwarper Extended practice of magic has improved your capabilities. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to expert.

Walking Armory.name: Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Operative Resilience.name: Operative Resilience
Operative Resilience.description: You have a hardy physique. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Inscrutable.name: Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description: It's nigh impossible for your enemies to unravel your schemes or your long-term plans. When a creature rolls a critical success or success on a Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} against you, or on a skill check to Gather Information or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your secrets, they get a failure instead. When you roll a critical failure or failure on a saving throw against an effect or ability that would read or reveal your thoughts, emotions, or intentions, you get a success instead.

Tactician.name: Tactician
Tactician.description: When you aren't directing allies, you focus on a situation's shifting circumstances, readying to react. At the end of each of your turns, you gain one additional reaction, which you can use before the beginning of your next turn for any envoy reaction.

Perfect Harmony.name: Perfect Harmony
Perfect Harmony.description: You discover the ultimate truth of your connection and its role as a foundation of the cosmos. You learn your chosen connection's perfect harmony.

Leader's Confidence.name: Leader's Confidence
Leader's Confidence.description: Whether you're calm and collected or projecting confidence through gritted teeth, you don't let your team see you lose your cool. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gZr207z8Q7AuH2RT]{Steel Yourselves!} envoy directive.

Adaptive Talent.name: Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
You're quick thinking and adaptable, capable of picking up new skills and talents with little practice or training. During your daily preparations, select one skill feat that you meet the prerequisites for. You gain this skill feat until you prepare again. Since you have this feat temporarily, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option. You can use this for effects that temporarily give you access to other abilities, such as taking @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} to temporarily learn a new language.

As your envoy level increases, so does your ability to adapt to new situations. At 9th level and 15th level, increase the number of skill feats you gain this way by 1. You can use feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent as a prerequisite for other feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent, but you still can't use them as prerequisites for permanent character options.

Elemental.name: Elemental
Elemental.description:
You channel the raw power of the primordial elements that converge to create the Universe and everything in it. You might have a strong affinity with one or more elements, or maybe you visited one of the elemental planes and were touched by the journey. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} general feat.

Tradition primal

Connection Skill Nature

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5y70IWhVV6bVjC9N]{Recharge Weapon}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire}*; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1K6AYGisvo9gqdhs]{Elemental Form}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.xS4bqHnbodCwjpqI]{Promession}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kGas0LdEAR1WjLGZ]{Absolute Zero}*; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.x7SPrsRxGb2Vy2nu]{Earthquake}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jrBa9deU2ULFWvSl]{Falling Stars}

*Replace the elemental trait and damage type with the trait and damage type of your active elemental weapon or elemental barrier epiphany spells.

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d5dmu4HZ3YyrwcaF]{Elemental Weapon}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5apI8Yamauo02VYR]{Elemental Barrier}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.DZOjyZBZUrzkw5q2]{Elemental Nova}

Harmony When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}, choose an elemental trait: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood. If one or more of your elemental epiphanies are active, you must select the elemental trait you chose as part of casting those spells. Until the end of their next turn, the target's next Strike deals damage based on the chosen trait (your choice), rather than its typical damage type: electricity or sonic for air, bludgeoning or piercing for earth, acid or slashing for metal, fire for fire, bludgeoning or cold for water, or piercing or poison for wood.

Perfect Harmony During your daily preparations, choose an elemental trait (as listed in harmony). You gain resistance equal to half your level to both damage types associated with the element you selected. If you chose fire, you additionally gain resistance to cold. Whenever you heal a bonded ally with Transfer Vitality, the target gains these resistances until the beginning of your next turn.

Weapon Expertise.name: 武器专家 Weapon Expertise
Weapon Expertise.description:
Envoy You've learned a few tricks with your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you attack the target of your Get 'Em!, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Mystic You win battles with basic weapons. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Witchwarper You've gained a broader understanding of conventional weaponry to augment your unconventional spellcasting. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Stellar Resilience.name: Stellar Resilience
Stellar Resilience.description: Stellar energy flows throughout your entire being like an unstoppable tidal wave, strengthening both body and mind. Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to expert. When you roll a success on a Fortitude or Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} as a free action.

Weapon Specialization.name: 武器专精 Weapon Specialization
Weapon Specialization.description:
Envoy, Operative, Witchwarper You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 damage if you're a master, and 4 damage if you're legendary.

Mystic You've learned to protect yourself and your allies with your weapons. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master and 4 if you're legendary.

Solarian You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you've practiced with most. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Soldier You inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Greater Resolve.name: 高等决心 Greater Resolve
Greater Resolve.description: Your ambition and stubbornness grant you mental resiliency. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to legendary. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead. When you roll a critical failure on a Will save, you get a failure instead. When you fail a Will save against a damaging effect, you take half damage.

Initial Epiphany.name: Initial Epiphany
Initial Epiphany.description:
You discover the basic truth of your connection. You learn your chosen connection's initial epiphany spell. Epiphany spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to spend time with your bonded allies or otherwise ponder the nature of your connection.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Operative Expertise.name: Operative Expertise
Operative Expertise.description: Your techniques are now harder to resist. Your proficiency rank for your operative class DC increases to expert.

Soldier Expertise.name: Soldier Expertise
Soldier Expertise.description: Your ability to unleash area attacks and utilize your equipment improves. Your proficiency rank for your soldier class DC increases to expert.

Core Memories.name: Core Memories
Core Memories.description:
No matter where you travel, precious memories keep you tethered to reality. Whatever the nature and number of your memories, you can focus on them to remind yourself which of the infinite possible realities impacts you the most: your own.

Anchor Benefit During your daily preparations, choose a skill you're trained in. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} in that skill. If you're expert in that skill, and the skill has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action, you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.H3I2X0f7v4EzwxuN]{Automatic Knowledge} in that skill.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition by 1. You can only benefit from this once per round.

Striker.name: Striker
Striker.description:
You specialize in hand-to-hand combat and prefer to fight with your fists or lightweight melee weapons, rather than guns. Whether you're a daredevil who lives for the thrill, a martial artist who likes to show off, or an assassin who kills with a personal touch, you take the fight to your foes and use your body as a weapon. You're trained in Athletics. You gain a skill feat for Athletics.

Exploit: You have expert proficiency with one-handed melee weapons and unarmed attacks with the agile or finesse traits instead of with martial guns. Whenever you increase your proficiency with martial guns, you instead increase your proficiency with one-handed agile and finesse melee weapons, agile and finesse unarmed attacks, and simple guns.

In addition, when you Aim, you can Aim with and apply the benefits to a one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait rather than with a ranged weapon. Treat any one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait as a gun for purposes of meeting the requirements of operative feats. Instead of making a ranged Strike with an operative feat, you can make a Strike with an one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eBxEPfTafaJaK4Kf]{Reactive Step} reaction.

Enhanced Exploit: You find yourself able to overwhelm foes that you study. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.m4IGOcYt8TBpYD8T]{Overwhelming Strike} free action.

Erudite Warrior.name: Erudite Warrior
Erudite Warrior.description:
You realize that not every situation should be solved with a gun. You're an intellectual as well as a warrior, solving problems logically and learning about the galaxy. You keep your mind sharp with formal education or self-guided study. When logic breaks down, you're always ready to fall back on your combat training.

Choose either Diplomacy or Society. You become trained in the chosen skill and one Lore skill of your choice. When you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.vt4e3FdwvI3hNkEf]{Armor Expertise}, you gain expert proficiency in Diplomacy or Society (whichever you selected) and the Lore skill you selected. This increases to master proficiency when you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Gs1MRPZ3s3TXwEsX]{Armor Mastery}, and to legendary proficiency when you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5uMdhwOXbamPbNHA]{Legendary Armor}. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TBLHu4RhvhPrKid6]{Oppressive Presence} action.

Leadership Style.name: Leadership Style
Leadership Style.description:
Whether it comes naturally, or you trained for it, you've developed a personal style of leading others. At 1st level, select a leadership style. You become trained in the indicated leadership skill, you gain the indicated leadership perk, and know the associated leadership directive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{From the Front}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{From the Shadows}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{Guns Blazing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{In the Spotlight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{Infosphere Director}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{Through Desperate Times}

Tactical Barrage.name: Tactical Barrage
Tactical Barrage.description: You unleash a devastating barrage of attacks upon your mark. Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against your mark is –3 (–2 with an agile weapon) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –6 (–4 with an agile weapon) on your third or subsequent attack of the turn, instead of –10.

Infosphere Director.name: Infosphere Director
Infosphere Director.description:
You control the flow of information, playing a critical role during a battle or while planning your next mission. You might give commands through a comm unit or datapad or using telepathic communication.

Leadership Skill Computers

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.4oIErnhDm0qCCpxs]{Digital Assessment!}

Armor Mastery.name: 护甲大师 Armor Mastery
Armor Mastery.description:
Solarian You deftly protect yourself in almost any situation. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, and unarmored defense increase to master.

Soldier Your skill with armor further improves. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to master.

Skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
You specialize in close-quarters missions that require you to operate in crowded or tight spaces, such as inside buildings or vehicles, down narrow alleys, or in busy downtown streets. Whether you're a mugger, bodyguard, assassin, or urban mercenary, you favor pistols and can use them efficiently in tight spaces. You're trained in Acrobatics. You gain a skill feat for Acrobatics.

Exploit: You're trained to fight in close combat using pistols. Your ranged Strikes with one-handed ranged weapons don't trigger reactions that are triggered by a ranged attack.

Enhanced Exploit: Your point-blank shots are particularly deadly. When you make a successful Strike against an adjacent enemy with a one-handed ranged weapon, you calculate the damage as if the lowest-rolled weapon damage die for the attack had the maximum result instead. At 17th level, the two lowest-rolled damage dice increase to the maximum result.

Mystic Spellcasting.name: Mystic Spellcasting
Mystic Spellcasting.description:
You are a spellcaster and can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a mystic, when you cast spells, you might intone a prayer or hum a song inspired by your epiphanies, you might gesture or dance in patterns that follow the flow of your connection's network, and you might accompany your spellcasting with wisps of energy flowing between you and your bonded allies.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a mystic, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast, as shown on the Mystic Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of mystic spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level mystic, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level mystic, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Solarian Expertise.name: Solarian Expertise
Solarian Expertise.description: Your ability to manipulate stellar forces has improved. Your proficiency rank for your solarian class DC increases to expert.

From the Shadows.name: From the Shadows
From the Shadows.description:
You prefer to direct your allies in subtle ways, without drawing much attention from foes. You might sneak in behind your bodyguards or support your team from a safe distance.

Leadership Skill Stealth

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance (Stealth)} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8mIyIlniGH2SMO6B]{Coordinated Ambush!}

Stellar Partition.name: Stellar Partition
Stellar Partition.description: Your solar nimbus protects you against mental intrusions. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you get a critical success instead.

Hidden Agenda.name: Hidden Agenda
Hidden Agenda.description: You've become an expert at veiling your schemes. When a creature rolls a critical success to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} against you, or a skill check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your secrets, they get a success instead. When you roll a critical failure on a saving throw against an effect or ability that would read or reveal your thoughts, emotions, or intentions, magically or otherwise, you get a failure instead.

Specialized Skill Set.name: Specialized Skill Set
Specialized Skill Set.description: At 3rd level, 7th level, and 15th level, you gain a skill feat. This feat must be for the trained skill from your operative's specialization.

Stellar Paragon.name: Stellar Paragon
Stellar Paragon.description: You're a paragon among solarians, capable of shaping stellar forces into powerful weapons that bend to your will. Your proficiency ranks for your solar flare and solar weapon increase to legendary.

Greater Weapon Specialization.name: 高等武器专精 Greater Weapon Specialization
Greater Weapon Specialization.description: 你源自武器专精职业特性的伤害，在武器熟练度至专家的武器和无武装攻击上提升至4，若熟练度至大师则为6，若熟练度为传奇则为8。

Legendary Improvisation.name: Legendary Improvisation
Legendary Improvisation.description: Your improvisation skills have dramatically improved. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.sqSpxpY0831nV1wc]{Improvised Mastery} triggers on skill checks using a skill that you don't have legendary proficiency in, rather than master proficiency, and it grants you legendary proficiency for the triggering check, rather than master proficiency.

Quantum Thesis.name: Quantum Thesis
Quantum Thesis.description: You command the most potent magic and can cast spells of truly incredible power. Add two common 10th-rank spells of your tradition to your repertoire. You gain a single 10th-rank spell slot you can use to cast these spells, using witchwarper spellcasting. Unlike with other spell slots, you can't use 10th-rank slots with abilities that give you more spell slots or that let you cast spells without expending spell slots. You don't gain more 10th-rank spells as you level up, but you can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.MVT7iJNv6L3y2eL9]{Quantum Research} feat to gain a second slot.

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.description:
You specialize in targeting foes from far away and attacking while unseen. Whether you're peeking around a corner, perching on a distant rooftop, or aiming from the back line of a squad formation, you favor sniper rifles and prefer to line up the perfect shot rather than rush into combat. You're trained in Stealth. You gain a skill feat for Stealth.

Exploit: You ignore the unwieldy and volley trait of guns you wield belonging to the sniper group. You gain one of the following operative feats as a bonus feat: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.4bMox7VXPrLzKsV8]{Keep Them in Your Sights} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.rhEfisGERMwwn0qz]{Scope Sight}.

Enhanced Exploit: Your first failed ranged Strike against your mark using a sniper weapon doesn't count toward your multiple attack penatly. You can Reload your sniper weapon as a free action once per turn.

Quantum Defenses.name: Quantum Defenses
Quantum Defenses.description: The flow of your spellcasting and your defensive training combine to help you avoid attacks. Your proficiency ranks in light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Solar Weapon Expertise.name: Solar Weapon Expertise
Solar Weapon Expertise.description: Your connection to stellar forces make your weapons lethal. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you get a critical hit with your solar flare or solar weapon, you get its critical specialization effect.

Light Armor Mastery.name: 轻甲大师 Light Armor Mastery
Light Armor Mastery.description: 你运用轻甲的技巧再次提高，提升了你闪避猛击的能力。你在轻甲以及无甲防御上的熟练度提升至大师。

Resolve.name: 决意 Resolve
Resolve.description:
Envoy You've strengthened your mind with an inner reservoir of determination. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative You've steeled your mind with resolve. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description: You can cast spells directly into your quantum field. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.E7HvICcH9CRAVzGc]{Isolated Spell Matrix} action.

Wise to the Game.name: Wise to the Game
Wise to the Game.description: Using your words to influence others is what you do, and you easily recognize when others attempt to use the same tactics against you. You gain a +1 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to you and attempts to divert your attention with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, and a +1 status bonus to your Will DC against emotion effects.

In the Spotlight.name: In the Spotlight
In the Spotlight.description:
Whether through conversation, clever lies, dazzling performances, or threats, you rely on charm and cunning to influence others. You crave being in the spotlight.

Leadership Skill Performance

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rlhZC1VPq3XixagS]{Dance Partner!}

Soldier Fighting Style.name: Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Galaxy Renowned.name: Galaxy Renowned
Galaxy Renowned.description: Your reputation as a shooter precedes you wherever you go in the galaxy. Your proficiency rank increases to legendary with advanced guns. Your proficiency rank for your operative class DC increases to master.

Armor Storm.name: Armor Storm
Armor Storm.description:
Your armor feels like a part of you and stands up to heavy fire in the thick of battle. Your armor absorbs greater damage from attacks made by enemies you've suppressed. In a fight, you likely body block or stand in front and try to keep the enemy's ire, trusting your armor to keep you alive.

You can choose to not count as being in the area of a ranged weapon you've made an attack with. You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to all damage against attacks made by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} targets.

You don't need a free hand to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}. You gain a +1 status bonus on Athletics checks to Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, and Trip suppressed foes. When you successfully Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, or Trip a creature, it becomes suppressed until the start of your next turn.

Paradox.name: Paradox
Paradox.description:
Your existence is contrary to the status quo of the universe, causing quantum ripples that empower your spellcasting talent and open doorways to other worlds. Perhaps you're from an alternate reality or a different timeline, or perhaps you experienced an unnatural phenomenon that altered your path, discovered a time-glitching alien device, or wrote a treatise on quantum magical theory. Whatever your story, you've become a living paradox.

At 1st level, choose your paradox. Your chosen paradox determines the tradition of your spells, additional trained skills, additional spells you learn, and the effects of your quantum field. You also gain Focus Points and special focus spells called warp spells based on your paradox.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{Analyst}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{Anomaly}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{Gap Influenced}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{Precog}

Perception Expertise.name: 察觉专家 Perception Expertise
Perception Expertise.description:
Envoy You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mystic, Soldier You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Witchwarper You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Mastery.name: 武器大师训练 Weapon Mastery
Weapon Mastery.description: You know your weapons like you know yourself. Your proficiency ranks for simple and martial weapons and unarmed attacks increase to master.

Bombard.name: Bombard
Bombard.description:
There's nothing like a big gun (or maybe several) to get you through tough times. You've come to terms with the fact that a stray bullet from one of your barrages might sometimes hit an ally, but you try to minimize such instances of "friendly fire." You've trained to avoid harming allies with your barrages and learned to expertly position your attacks around them.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Healing.name: Healing
Healing.description:
You're connected to the fount of vitality and void energy that flows through all living things on every planet. You weave these energies into spells that heal your allies and harm your enemies.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Medicine

Connection Spells

  • cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize};
  • 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal};
  • 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8ViwItUgwT4lOvvb]{False Vitality};
  • 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike};
  • 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{Genetic Regeneration};
  • 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life};
  • 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination};
  • 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]{Execute};
  • 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal};
  • 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.10VcmSYNBrvBphu1]{Massacre}

Epiphany Spells

  • initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d7Mj4nUQe8wg1mV7]{Infusion};
  • advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zzi7LUKxKNWr5GsG]{Vitality Nova};
  • greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MTulATAiOZfZNQ9d]{Vital Rebirth}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, attempt to counteract one affliction affecting the target, or attempt to counteract one effect of your choice imposing one of the following conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}.

Perfect Harmony Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions you can counteract with your harmony. In addition, if you didn't counteract the effect, but you would've if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description: You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Master Spellcaster.name: 大师施法者 Master Spellcaster
Master Spellcaster.description:
Mystic You channel magic through your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to master.

Witchwarper Your spells are among the most potent across all possible worlds. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to master.

Magical Fortitude.name: 魔法强韧 Magical Fortitude
Magical Fortitude.description: Magical power has improved your body's resiliency. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Tangible Object.name: Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Operative's Edge.name: Operative's Edge
Operative's Edge.description: You've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, making you faster to react during combat. If you take the Incredible Initiative feat, your circumstance bonus to initiative rolls becomes +3 instead.

Envoy Expertise.name: Envoy Expertise
Envoy Expertise.description: You've come a long way, and your hands-on experience has improved your skills. Your proficiency rank for your envoy class DC increases to expert.

Tough as Nails.name: Tough as Nails
Tough as Nails.description: Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Fortitude save, you get a critical success instead.

Anchor.name: 深扎 Anchor
Anchor.description:
Whatever paradox altered the course of your existence, something helps keep you anchored to reality. This might be a physical object you carry, memories of your home, or loved ones. At 1st level, select an anchor.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Gravitas.name: Gravitas
Gravitas.description: You avoid harm by manipulating gravitational forces to protect your body. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description: Your savvy and skill are unparalleled. Your proficiency rank for your envoy class DC increases to master. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MZ65QZDqa9ignWXm]{Silver Tongue} action.

Action Hero.name: Action Hero
Action Hero.description:
You believe that anything can be solved by shooting your way out. Somehow, your bravado and over-the-top actions have a way of working out for you, despite logic often suggesting otherwise. To you, there's no problem that a barrage of bullets or laser blasts can't fix. You've become a specialist at dealing out devastation with automatic weapons, whether you're fighting on the front line, operating a turret in a speeding vehicle, or blasting through a crowd of enemies.

When you successfully make a ranged Strike with an automatic weapon, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} the target until the start of your next turn. In addition, when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}, the size of the cone is equal to the weapon's full range increment, rather than half. When using the Auto-Fire action, you can designate a target anywhere in the cone to be your primary target, rather than the creature closest to you.

Soldier Weapon Expert.name: Soldier Weapon Expert
Soldier Weapon Expert.description: Through practical experience, you've learned how to use your weapons in a way that both pulverizes your foes and best takes advantage of your area attacks. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to expert. You gain access to the critical specialization effects of weapons with the area or automatic traits.

Incredible Senses.name: Incredible Senses
Incredible Senses.description:
Envoy You notice things that are almost impossible for an ordinary person to detect. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to legendary.

Operative Your eyes are incredibly sharp even without a scope. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to legendary.

Solarian Weapon Mastery.name: Solarian Weapon Mastery
Solarian Weapon Mastery.description: Your weapon becomes an extension of yourself. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to master.

Transcendence.name: Transcendence
Transcendence.description: You're an embodiment of your connection and manifest your transcendence with miraculous spells. Add two common 10th-rank spells of your tradition to your repertoire. You gain a single 10th-rank spell slot you can use to cast these spells, using mystic spellcasting. Unlike other spell slots, you don't gain more 10th-rank spells as you level up, and they can't be used for abilities that let you cast spells without expending spell slots or abilities that give you more spell slots. You can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.6tu2lS0CgxiDMHVO]{Transcended Existence} mystic feat to gain a second slot.

Suppressing Fire.name: Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description: You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Reflex Mastery.name: Reflex Mastery
Reflex Mastery.description:
Envoy You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, dragon's breath, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, sentry turrets, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Precog.name: Precog
Precog.description:
Some event has unstuck you in time. You might come from the distant past or a far-flung future. Perhaps you've traveled from some forsaken timeline to stop a cataclysmic event. Whatever the reason, you're now gifted with the ability to see and manipulate time in a way that few others comprehend.

Tradition occult

Paradox Skill Piloting

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sNUvbMoMeLTnYJm8]{Injury Echo}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.H0WECXb2wvTHT9yk]{Temporal Bullets}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.GdlG9a4o0ax0F2HT]{Time's Edge}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Ib3qxIC0bFD3ued]{Weight of Ages}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g58dbrP7FadZhh6j]{Chrono Push}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr]{Phantasmal Calamity}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1gkdgFwKfAoQx163]{Warp Time}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RDvWFbAaXtxrhJMD]{Accelerate}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HzFdtjvRCFpb0NrS]{Time Loop}

Quantum Field You have a modicum of control of the temporal flow that surrounds you. An enemy creature that uses a move action inside your quantum field takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speed during that action. You and your allies gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed during move actions that are used inside your quantum field.

Legendary Gunner.name: Legendary Gunner
Legendary Gunner.description: You're a local legend who's known for your prowess with weaponry. Your proficiency rank increases to legendary with simple and martial guns, and to master with advanced guns. Your proficiency rank increases to expert with simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks.

Envoy Directives.name: Envoy Directives
Envoy Directives.description:
Envoys encourage their allies with directives. A directive is an order that benefits allies who follow it. Envoy directives include a way for the envoy to lead by example by spending more actions for increased effects. Directives have the auditory or visual trait depending on how you inspire your allies.

You begin with one envoy directive. You can learn more directives through the envoy class, envoy class feats, and your leadership style. You can issue one directive a round. Unless otherwise stated, an envoy's directive and the benefits it grants last until the beginning of your next turn.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} envoy directive.

Akashic.name: Akashic
Akashic.description:
You maintain a permanent psychic link to the Akashic Record, the supernatural repository of all knowledge in the multiverse. This connection allows you to access knowledge that otherwise would remain beyond the grasp of regular mortal minds.

Tradition occult

Connection Skill Occultism

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.nf8q0zvJDnnkzANe]{Scan Environment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kTzbLqmqPcZwOa5F]{Wave of Warning}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.f98vwzcdxafum8ln]{Akashic Revival}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAu69GVbFKYzQM5a]{Akashic Fount}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.z0Spgrf92nmaqjCW]{Akashic Assistant}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CjVOXjuvvTJqC7AD]{Data Drain}

Harmony When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}, the target receives a psychic download from the Akashic Record and can immediately attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as a reaction. This doesn't trigger any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when a creature uses Recall Knowledge.

Perfect Harmony You create an extradimensional memory palace that functions as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]{Planar Palace}. Creating a door to the demiplane takes 1 minute. The memory palace keeps the same layout each time you access it, adjustable during daily preparations. Each phantasmal minion in your memory palace functions as an akashic assistant (like those created by the akashic assistant epiphany spell).

Focused.name: Focused
Focused.description: You're highly focused on your target and able to discern their moves. When you roll a success on a Reflex or Will save against your mark, you get a critical success instead.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
Your paradox grants you magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witchwarper, when you cast spells, you might describe your revelations about other realities aloud, accompanied by elegant gestures while arcane equations or occult symbols blaze around you.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a witchwarper, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Charisma or Intelligence modifier, depending on which you chose for your key attribute.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witchwarper spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Warp Spells

You can create powerful magical phenomena known as warp spells. Warp spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a warp spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to contemplate infinite worlds or conduct quantum magical research.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Warp spells have the anchoring trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means you can only use warp spells while your quantum field is active, and you automatically Sustain your quantum field when you cast warp spells.

You learn warp spells based on your paradox.

Anomaly.name: Anomaly
Anomaly.description:
Your existence is an anomaly that defies the normal parameters of your current reality. You might have encountered something that disrupted your core existence, or you crossed the veil from an alternate reality or twisted timeline.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Deception

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jgN33YSYXB8iIHTw]{Stumble}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qkehzRdn7JeGrR6E]{Void Whispers}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jyrxfWeeCsrkhNit]{Eldritch Wrath}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sTpdXXaaKhoGOIxh]{Void Vessel}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.J3zMwmhIVgI2yzxm]{Call Cosmos}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TN2pHF9l3k4ZJ7di]{Warp Terrain}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9w90nlUdV5HBRWFm]{Warp World}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XoYUZP9OYdDMz4I0]{Parallel Forms}

Quantum Field Movements blur as images of alternate iterations of your enemies flicker around them. When an enemy in your quantum field attempts an action with the concentrate trait, the action is disrupted unless they succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5|showDC:all]. The first time a creature fails this check, it becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Vitality Network.name: Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
Your soul supports a network of energy that connects and heals those in your bond. Your vitality network has a maximum capacity equal to 6 + 4 Hit Points per level. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality} action that you can use to take Hit Points out of your network and into yourself or your allies as healing.

Life-and-death situations help strengthen your bonds with your allies. At the start of each turn in combat, when you regain actions, your vitality network regains 4 Hit Points; if you're master in spell DC, it regains 6 Hit Points instead; if you're legendary, it regains 8 Hit Points. When you Refocus, your vitality network regains all its Hit Points.

Solarian Mastery.name: Solarian Mastery
Solarian Mastery.description: Your ability to manipulate stellar forces is unparalleled. Your proficiency rank for your solarian class DC increases to master.

Quantum Field.name: Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
You can draw on paradoxical forces to create a reality-warping quantum field. It might manifest as a haze in the air that shows shimmers of alternate realities, appear as walls of glowing magical equations, or any other display you choose. The effects of your quantum field are determined by your paradox. You can further enhance and manipulate your quantum field through your witchwarper feat selections and by casting warp spells. You can activate or extend the duration of your quantum field by using reality-warping magic.

You have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} action, which lets you activate your quantum field. This action gains the arcane or occult trait based on the tradition of your selected paradox. You also have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{Quantum Pulse}, which lets you establish your quantum field quickly at the start of combat.

Soldier's Resolution.name: Soldier's Resolution
Soldier's Resolution.description: Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Focal Point.name: Focal Point
Focal Point.description:
You're intensely focused on a specific subject, to the point that other things fade into the background—even paradoxes and alternate realities. Your focal point might be a field of study, an abstract concept, a hobby, or even your favorite media.

Anchor Benefit Your single-minded focus helps you concentrate. If a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting action, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If you succeed, your action isn't disrupted.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} condition by 1, and ignore the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} condition until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

Perception Mastery.name: 察觉大师 Perception Mastery
Perception Mastery.description: Through your adventures, you've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

Rhythm.name: Rhythm
Rhythm.description:
You feel the song that moves the stars, channeling this cosmic beat through the power of audible rhythm and universal vibrations known by many as the Song of the Spheres. You might simply have a melody or tune in your mind that you feel compelled to share, beginning with the allies tied to your bond.

Tradition primal

Connection Skill Performance

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yvs1zN5Pai5U4CJX]{Summon Instrument}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5ZZca1GGJs44OxC8]{Motivating Ringtone}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wzLkNU3AAqOSKFPR]{Noise Blast}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.K2WpC3FFoHrqX9Q5]{Hypnotize}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fa1f7VtZitQYrArX]{Battle Sonata}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RQjSQVZRG497cJhX]{Vibrant Pattern}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g9QLswd5uqDdcCjv]{Howl}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Jvyy6oVIQsD34MHB]{Uncontrollable Dance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.FmNDwqMEjeTEGPrY]{Unfathomable Song}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.smCC1LNhMb7Z1lrU]{Anthem}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.AlYzxLKWZujnzsjJ]{Shuffle}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ii8adgcCejAovsNv]{Remix}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, you can extend the duration of any active epiphany from the rhythm connection by 1 round.

Perfect Harmony The first time each round you Transfer Vitality, the target who regained Hit Points can Stride as a free action. This has the traversal trait.

Guns Blazing.name: Guns Blazing
Guns Blazing.description:
You lead your team by making an impression with firepower. Your bombastic personality has a barrage of gunfire to back it up, and you always shoot first.

Leadership Skill Acrobatics

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.2kwXTUjYYhoAGySr]{Incredible Initiative} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RNilk6Evoi0xNbWX]{Ready Arms!}

Stellar Attunement.name: Stellar Attunement
Stellar Attunement.description:
As a solarian, your existence cycles between the aspects of stars. You begin with two aspects: photon (the power of stars to emit heat, light, and plasma) and graviton (the power of stars to attract and imprison objects through gravity). At any time, you're considered graviton-attuned, photon-attuned, or unattuned. Many of your abilities have additional effects based on your current attunement, and some abilities swap your current state of attunement to another state.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} action.

Shadow.name: 暗影 Shadow
Shadow.description:
You know every shadow is a portal to the Netherworld, and like an artist molding clay, you sculpt that realm's shadowy substance into dreadful and wondrous shapes at your whim.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Stealth

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Flicker}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG]{Shadow Blast}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0jadeyQIItIuRgeH]{Eclipse Burst}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uh9Br4yrKvJA6zq0]{Shadow Snap}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rluzzX2ml4yFWnYw]{Cloying Shadows}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.pgjlPNfXCpEYyLVu]{Shadow Prison}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, the target's shadow darkens and swells, reducing bright light within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the target to dim light. This is a form of magical darkness and can overcome non-magical light sources or attempt to counteract magical light. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while in this dim light and can use the concealed condition to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. This lasts until the end of your next turn.

Perfect Harmony You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.u9NU2bULHg3S5FaP]{Umbral Stride} action. When you Transfer Vitality, the target can use this action once before the end of their next turn.

Mystic Bond.name: Mystic Bond
Mystic Bond.description:
You form a bond between yourself and others, most typically your closest companions. Forming bonds is different for every mystic but always involves using a 10-minute activity related to the mystic's connection that requires you to be adjacent to the creature with whom you wish to bond. You can maintain a bond with up to 10 other willing creatures, and the bond lasts until you or the bonded creature are no longer willing to be part of the bond. You are always considered part of your own bond and don't count toward the 10-creature limit.

You always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, their Hit Point totals, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. This ability doesn't work across planes (including when in transit in the Drift), and some special magical or technological effects might interfere with your ability to detect your allies.

Legendary Soldier.name: Legendary Soldier
Legendary Soldier.description: You're a legendary hero (or outlaw) of the galaxy renowned for the rain of destruction you unleash on a battlefield. Your proficiency rank for your soldier class DC increases to legendary.

Signature Spells.name: 标志性法术 Signature Spells
Signature Spells.description: You've learned to cast some of your spells more flexibly, granting you extra control over your spellcasting. For each spell rank you have access to, choose one spell of that rank to be a signature spell. You don't need to learn heightened versions of signature spells separately; instead, you can heighten these spells freely. If you've learned a signature spell at a higher level than its minimum, you can also cast all its lower-rank versions without learning those separately. If you swap out a signature spell, you can choose a replacement signature spell of the same spell rank at which you learned the previous spell. You can also retrain specifically to change a signature spell to a different spell of that rank without swapping any spells; this takes as much time as retraining a spell normally does.

Critical Aim.name: Critical Aim
Critical Aim.description: The first time in each round when you Aim and successfully make a ranged Strike against your mark, add your weapon's critical specialization effect to the attack even if you didn't score a critical hit.

Primary Target.name: Primary Target
Primary Target.description: You can focus fire on a single target when unleashing the full devastation of your powerful area weaponry. Before you make an area attack with a weapon (such as from the Area Fire or Auto-Fire actions), you can make a ranged Strike as a free action with the same weapon against a single creature in the area, who's selected as your primary target. If your attack is a burst, you must select the creature closest to the center of the attack. If your attack is a cone or line, you must select the creature closest to you. If two or more creatures are equidistant, you can choose which one is your primary target. On a hit, if your primary target rolls a success against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire action, they get a failure instead. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Operative's Specialization.name: Operative's Specialization
Operative's Specialization.description:
As an operative, you have a particular set of skills based on your tactical style. These different specializations help define your character and the approach you take to most situations. Choose an operative's specialization. This specialization grants you training in one skill, a skill feat for that skill, and an exploit. At 9th level, you gain the enhanced exploit granted by your specialization. The specializations presented in this book are as follows.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{Ghost}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{Infiltrator}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{Skirmisher}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{Sniper}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{Striker}

Soldier Weapon Mastery.name: Soldier Weapon Mastery
Soldier Weapon Mastery.description: Through skill and dedication, you've mastered devastating weapons. Your proficiency rank for your soldier class DC increases to master. Your proficiency ranks for unarmed attacks, simple weapons, and martial weapons increase to master.

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Savvy Improviser.name: Savvy Improviser
Savvy Improviser.description: You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.sqSpxpY0831nV1wc]{Improvised Mastery} twice per day. Additionally, the first time per day when you roll a natural 1 on a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check, you don't automatically reduce your degree of success (you get a critical failure only if your result is 10 lower than the DC).

Improvised Mastery.name: Improvised Mastery
Improvised Mastery.description: Whether by luck or instinct, you display impressive talent on the fly. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.WFFYDg0sgjaXCeq6]{Improvised Mastery} action.

Group Chat.name: Group Chat
Group Chat.description: Creatures in your bond can communicate telepathically while within 120 feet of one another. As long as two bonded creatures are on the same plane of existence and both are alive, they remain aware of one another's present state, general direction and distance from one another, and if they're conscious, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, or dead. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XSMTalRsPwQ0beIE]{Network Spell} action.

On the Move.name: On the Move
On the Move.description: You gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed. This increases to a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed at 16th level.

From the Front.name: From the Front
From the Front.description:
You're most comfortable leading your allies from the front lines of battle while you fight alongside them. You might raise a shield to help weather the storm of incoming gunfire or simply lead with a pointed finger and a shout of encouragement as you run into the center of the enemy formation.

Leadership Skill Athletics

Leadership Perk You're trained in medium armor. When you gain light armor expertise, you also gain expert proficiency in medium armor, and when you gain light armor mastery, you also gain master proficiency in medium armor.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1lkfbLoteDlzoqxb]{Into Position!}

Infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
Infiltrator.description:
You specialize in bypassing security systems, hazards, traps, and other defenses. From hacking a computer system or cutting power to a building, to bypassing a biometric lock and cracking a secure vault, you're skilled at accessing locations without alerting security or tripping safeguards. You're trained in Computers. You gain a skill feat for Computers.

Exploit: Your tinkering causes technological items and creatures to experience glitches and malfunctions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qbyer2woEdGXZzoR]{Sabotage} action.

Enhanced Exploit: You can Sabotage as a free action whenever you critically hit a tech creature with a melee or ranged attack, targeting the triggering creature. You can Sabotage as a reaction whenever a tech creature or a creature using a tech weapon critically fails a melee attack roll against you, targeting the triggering creature or weapon.

Solar Manifestations.name: Solar Manifestations
Solar Manifestations.description:
Your deep understanding of the stellar forces of the universe manifests in a variety of tangible ways. You can create and maintain three different manifestations: a solar flare, solar nimbus, and solar weapon. Your manifestations temporarily vanish if you become unattuned.

Solar Flare

A small mote of solar power hovers nearby or appears embedded on some part of your body, such as the palm of your hand or on your face. This mote can unleash a directed blast of energy at short range. Your solar flare is a martial ranged weapon in the brawling weapon group with the attuned and solarian traits. It doesn't take up a hand and doesn't need to be held to be wielded. Your solar flare can't be targeted by other creatures or removed from your person, except for when you become unattuned. Your attunement determines the damage type and range increment of your solar flare. You add your Strength modifier to damage rolls with your solar flare.
